title: MAYJAM Rose Essential Oil 10ML - Pure, Undiluted - Premium Quality Essential Oils with Glass Dropper - for Diffuser and DIY Candle Making
features: ❤ 【Wonderful Scent】- MAYJAM essential oils are concentrated derived from plants' flowers, leaves or other parts, which will provide you with a pure and pleasant aroma. The scents of Rose essential oil are rich and long lasting.
❤ 【Use】- Add a few drops to your favorite diffuser to enjoy the pleasures of Rose essential oils. MAYJAM essential oils could also be used in DIY. You can enjoy yourself in crafting at the same time.

❤ 【Thoughtful Design】- Each Rose essential oil is bottled in 10ML amber glass bottle to help keep the scent lasting. It also comes with a premium quality glass dropper to help you get the exact amount you desire.
❤ 【Ideal Gifts】- With elegant packaging, MAYJAM Rose essential oils are ideal as gifts for your families or friends for their Birthday, Christmas, Father's Day, Mother's Day or other holidays.

❤ 【Confident Services】- MAYJAM is committed to providing customers with products and services in time. If you are not satisfied completely with your essential oils of product, please let us know and we will help you with all my heart.
